cover.scene_hint: Blog host cutout (reference face from blog-hero) wearing a yellow safety helmet and futuristic worker jumpsuit, standing in front of a futuristic conveyor belt factory. On the conveyor belt, instead of mechanical parts, glowing 3D post icons, Telegram logos, and WordPress logos are being assembled. A robotic manipulator arm with a paint brush is painting a neon sign "AI Content" on a glowing billboard. The style is a vibrant DIY digital meme collage with torn paper edges, pink sticky notes, clear scotch tape, and a shocked cat meme reaction cutout in the corner. High-contrast colors, grunge paper texture background #F5F5F0.

inline_1.h2_anchor: 1. Что такое контент-завод на нейросетях и почему ручной промптинг умер в 2026 году
inline_1.scene_hint: A comparison table UI comparing 'Manual Prompting' vs 'Autonomous AI Factory'. Left side (Manual): red cross, slow, expensive, copy-paste. Right side (Factory): green checkmark, fast, $150/mo, 100% automated. Subtle human touch: pink sticky note with 'Ручной промптинг умер!' handwritten, clear tape on the corner. Style matches digital collage.
inline_1.alt: Сравнение: Ручной промптинг против Автономного ИИ-контент-завода

inline_2.h2_anchor: 2. Архитектура автономного конвейера: связка Make.com, n8n и ИИ-агентов
inline_2.scene_hint: A workflow diagram UI showing the architecture of the autonomous conveyor belt. Nodes: Web Scraping / Wordstat -> n8n / Make.com -> AI Agents (Researcher, Writer, Editor) -> Auto-posting (Telegram, WordPress). Connected with glowing marker arrows. Subtle human touch: torn paper strip, yellow sticky note with 'Связка n8n + Make' handwritten. Digital collage style.
inline_2.alt: Схема архитектуры автономного конвейера на n8n и Make.com

inline_3.h2_anchor: 3. Настройка ИИ-сотрудников: роли исследователя, копирайтера и редактора (Newsroom)
inline_3.scene_hint: An infographic card or dashboard showing three AI employee roles: 1. Researcher (deep web search), 2. Writer (SEO copywriter), 3. Editor (linter & QA). Each role has a small avatar icon and a checklist of tasks. Subtle human touch: pink highlighter brush stroke, scotch tape on the edges. Digital collage style.
inline_3.alt: Карточки ролей ИИ-сотрудников: Исследователь, Копирайтер, Редактор
